homeCourses.heading: Professional training and instruction in tactical and technical firearms handling, at all levels
homeCourses.basicDesc: They provide fundamental knowledge and skills in the safe and efficient use of firearms, serving as the basic foundation in the process of acquiring advanced knowledge and skills
homeCourses.advancedDesc: They provide advanced knowledge and skills in the tactical use of firearms, forming the foundation for participation in specialized tactical courses
homeCourses.specialDesc: They provide and ensure specialized knowledge and tactical skills
homeCourses.medicalDesc: They provide and ensure knowledge and skills in general and tactical medicine using modern medical equipment
homeCourses.technicalDesc: They provide knowledge and technical skills in the process of maintaining, servicing, and technical support of firearms and equipment
homeCourses.militaryDesc: Military courses fall into the category of restricted courses, primarily intended for government institutions, covering military weapons and equipment

homeAnnouncement.p1: This material is protected by copyright and may not be published or used without the express permission of the Tactical Training Team. The information presented here is for general educational and informational purposes only. Comprehensive training, procedures, and safety measures are absolutely necessary for safe operation and activities. Failure to follow safety procedures, measures, actions, and defined protocols and procedures may result in serious injury, death, and/or damage to property.
homeAnnouncement.p2: The information contained on this site is used at your own risk and discretion, with no influence or responsibility from the Tactical Training Team. Any activities without the supervision of a qualified instructor and/or authorized personnel from the Tactical Training Team are undertaken at your own full responsibility.
homeAnnouncement.p3: The “RESTRICTED” course group is intended solely for government institutions, military, police, security services, private military companies, and entities holding a government license for training, instruction, and/or use of restricted weapons, ammunition, and equipment (automatic weapons, heavy machine guns, grenade launchers, explosives, etc.).
homeAnnouncement.boldText: If you have a request for this type of course, contact us

aboutPage.p1: The company "Security Consulting Society – Tactical Training Team" Ltd. is a private legal entity registered in the Republic of Serbia in 2005, operating in several areas that constitute a unified entity:
aboutPage.l1: Training and instruction for military, police, security, and civilian personnel
aboutPage.l2: VIP services and security and protection in high-risk conditions
aboutPage.l3: Production of military weapons and equipment
aboutPage.l4: International trade in weapons, ammunition, military equipment, and dual-use goods
aboutPage.p2: Our company is registered and operates in accordance with the legal regulations of the Republic of Serbia as well as international regulations that define and govern the business activities we engage in.
aboutPage.p3: A significant portion of our staff is actively involved in various military and security missions around the world, which ensures a high standard of our services, allowing us to deploy our resources and initiate missions anywhere in the world at the client's request.
aboutPage.p4: For the purpose of building and strengthening business trust with existing and potential clients, improving business skills and productivity, and achieving and maintaining a stable level of service quality, the Tactical Training Team continuously works on monitoring, adapting, and finding new forms of communication and cooperation with its partners and clients.
aboutPage.p5: Our clients include governments, government institutions, companies, and individuals who require various advisory and practical military, police, and security services!

contactPage.heading: Have any question?
contactPage.p: Send us a message and we will respond as soon as possible.

coursesPage.restrictiveDesc: These courses are primarily intended for government institutions and licensed entities. For access and additional information, please contact us directly.
